name: Arrive Silver Spring
approxRentRange: $2,000-$2,575/mo (2BR; Bristol 2BR at $2,200 as of June 2026; 2-month-free special on 12+ mo leases)
bathroomsNote: 2BR plans range from 1BA (1,108 sq ft) to 2BA (1,170-1,300 sq ft); studio and 1BR are 1BA

notes.doorman: Multiple third-party listings describe a 'fully staffed concierge desk' and at least one aggregator cites '24/7 concierge'; office hours on Rentable are Mon-Fri 9AM-6PM, Sat 10AM-5PM, Sun 12PM-5PM, which contradicts a 24h claim; building's own site does not state hours; 'Likely staffed' is the honest call
notes.inUnitLaundry: Washer/dryer listed as available 'in select homes'; the building also has laundry rooms on every floor; not confirmed as a standard feature in all units, so Unclear
notes.unitClimate: Resident reviews indicate building controls the heating/cooling system seasonally; individual units do not have independent thermostat control over the central system
notes.balcony: Listing sites describe 'private patios and balconies' as a unit feature; availability varies by floor plan and unit
notes.wellMaintained: Marked No. November 2025: Montgomery County DHCA condemned one unit after tenant's viral TikTok showed rats; DHCA placed the building on formal notice after 15+ complaints in 2025 covering rodents, plumbing failures, and hot water outages. Management replaced pest control vendor and launched a 'specialized task force.' Apartmentratings.com (1,349 reviews) and other review sites show sustained complaints about roaches, slow maintenance response, and deteriorating common areas.
notes.petFriendly: $25/month per pet (max 2 pets); no deposit; breed restrictions apply (pit bulls, rottweilers, German shepherds, and mixes prohibited)
notes.packageRoom: Front desk handles package receipt; occasional reviewer complaints about misplacement
notes.has2BRor1BRDen: 2BR floor plans confirmed (Bristol and others); no 1BR+den plan found; property lists studio, 1BR, and 2BR only
notes.buildingDetails: 16-story high-rise; 891 units; built 1960s; managed by Trinity Property Consultants
notes.currentSpecials: 2 months free on 12+ month leases (as of June 2026)
